# HackArena3.0-proto

Central repository for HackArena 3.0 `.proto` definitions.

## Structure
- `proto/race/v1/` – racing API contracts
- `proto/snapshot/v1/` – snapshot API contracts
- `proto/achievement/v1/` – achievement API contracts

## Tooling
- [buf](https://buf.build) for linting and breaking-change detection
- GitHub Actions for CI/CD
